历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking was approximately 68,938; in 2025, it was about 62,125, an increase of roughly 6,813 places over two years, indicating significantly intensified competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 62,125. In 2025, the Physics Category planned to enroll 7 students, but in 2026, the plan is only 2 students, a sharp reduction of about 71%. The significant decrease in enrollment slots theoretically intensifies competition, and the ranking number should decrease (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has continuously declined from 189th in 2022 to 195th in 2025, and in 2026 it has fallen out of the top 200, showing a downward trend. The school ranks 30th in overall popularity on Douyin (TikTok), rated as 'relatively hot,' indicating some attention on short video platforms. There are no obvious negative public opinions or enrollment interruption records regarding the school's reputation; overall, it is stable. The total number of examinees in Anhui Province for the 2026 Gaokao is approximately 451,000, a slight decrease from 2025 (Physics Category 320,779 + History Category 141,400 = 462,179).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in rankings from 2024 to 2025, the significant enrollment reduction (71%) in 2026 intensifying competition, the continuous decline in Soft Science rankings, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 62,125, and incorporating correction factors such as the school's ranking decline and a slight decrease in total examinees, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 36,000, with a range of 35,500 to 36,500.
